title: Episcia picta
taxonomy: Episcia picta is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Episcia and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the Gesneriaceae family, Episcia picta is classified as part of the tribe Episcieae, along with other species in the genus Episcia. The family Gesneriaceae is further classified under the order Lamiales, which includes a wide range of flowering plant species. This classification reflects Episcia picta's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Gesneriaceae family.
